engagements.title: Northstar Logistics Margin Expansion

brief.summary: Northstar wants a proposal starter focused on gross margin recovery, warehouse productivity, and customer segment repricing over the next two quarters.
brief.goal: Identify the top profit levers, quantify impact, and outline a 12-week delivery plan with client and consultant responsibilities.
brief.ask: Prepare an executive-ready proposal starter and workplan with supporting evidence from prior cases.

businessContext.currentSituation: Northstar Logistics needs a tighter case for change and a clearer fact base before leadership can commit to a proposal scope.
businessContext.constraints: The team needs a practical plan that sharpens the brief quickly without creating avoidable stakeholder churn or over-analysis.

insights: Leadership is aligned on urgency, but the current brief for Northstar Logistics is still too broad for immediate execution.

The strongest early win is to turn "Identify the top profit levers, quantify impact, and outline a 12-week delivery plan with client and consultant responsibilities." into a quantified, time-bound outcome with named owners.
The proposal will be stronger if the storyline pairs diagnostic evidence with a pragmatic first-90-days plan.

matchedCases.title: Northstar Logistics Margin Expansion analog: commercial acceleration
matchedCases.blurb: Comparable transformation that combined opportunity sizing, leadership workshops, and a phased workplan to secure executive sign-off.

matchedCases.title: Northstar Logistics Margin Expansion analog: operating model redesign
matchedCases.blurb: Case example focused on turning a broad strategic brief into a board-ready proposal with sequenced workstreams and measurable outcomes.

proposalStarter.hook: A focused consulting sprint for Northstar Logistics to identify the top profit levers, quantify impact, and outline a 12-week delivery plan with client and consultant responsibilities. while keeping leadership aligned on the highest-value decisions.

workplan.output: Approved problem statement and steering questions
Initial fact base, hypotheses, and opportunity sizing
Draft proposal storyline and workstream architecture
Final proposal starter, implementation roadmap, and risk plan

keyRisks: Scope could sprawl if northstar wants a proposal starter focused on gross margin recovery, warehouse productivity, and customer segment repricing over the next two quarters. is not narrowed into explicit choices.
Stakeholder interviews may reveal competing success metrics across leadership roles.
The final proposal may over-index on analysis unless deliverables and decision points are locked early.
